grammar_points.title: 著名 vs 有名 — Two ways to say 'famous'
grammar_points.explanation: Both 著名 (zhù míng) and 有名 (yǒu míng) mean 'famous', but they differ in register and grammar. 著名 is formal and literary — it directly modifies nouns without 很: 著名演员, 著名作家, 著名艺术家. It cannot follow 很. 有名 is colloquial — it typically follows 很: 这位演员很有名. 有名 can also modify nouns (有名的演员) but is less common in that position. In formal writing and news Chinese, 著名 is strongly preferred.

examples.chinese: 她是一位著名演员，在很多精彩的京剧中表演过。
examples.pinyin: Tā shì yí wèi zhù míng yǎn yuán, zài hěn duō jīng cǎi de jīng jù zhōng biǎo yǎn guò.
examples.english: She is a famous actress who has performed in many brilliant Peking Operas.

examples.chinese: 这位功夫演员很有名，他的表演总是吸引大量观众。
examples.pinyin: Zhè wèi gōng fu yǎn yuán hěn yǒu míng, tā de biǎo yǎn zǒng shì xī yǐn dà liàng guān zhòng.
examples.english: This kung fu actor is very famous; his performances always attract large audiences.

grammar_points.title: 一口气 — In one breath / Non-stop
grammar_points.explanation:
一口气 literally means "one breath". Used as an adverb before a verb, it expresses doing something continuously from start to finish without stopping.

Structure: Subject + 一口气 + Verb + (Object)

• 他一口气读完了整本书。(He read the whole book in one go.)
• 她一口气爬上了山顶。(She climbed to the top of the mountain without stopping.)
• 我一口气喝完了一整瓶水。(I drank a whole bottle of water in one go.)

Tone: 一口气 often implies impressive effort or intensity. It is commonly used to describe reading, eating, running, or speaking without pause.

examples.chinese: 他一口气读完了整本书，一页都没跳过。
examples.pinyin: tā yì kǒu qì dú wán le zhěng běn shū yī yè dōu méi tiào guò
examples.english: He read the whole book in one go, without skipping a single page.

examples.chinese: 她一口气把所有作业做完了。
examples.pinyin: tā yì kǒu qì bǎ suǒ yǒu zuò yè zuò wán le
examples.english: She finished all her homework in one go.

examples.chinese: 他一口气说了很多话，让大家都很惊讶。
examples.pinyin: tā yì kǒu qì shuō le hěn duō huà ràng dà jiā dōu hěn jīng yà
examples.english: He spoke a great deal in one go, surprising everyone.

grammar_points.title: 吸引 + object patterns — To attract
grammar_points.explanation: 吸引(xī yǐn) means 'to attract' and is used in three main patterns. 主动 Active — 吸引 + Object: 这场演出吸引了很多人 (This performance attracted many people); add 住 for 吸引住 (completely captivate). Passive with 被 — 我被他的表演吸引了 (I was captivated by his performance); use 被 when being attracted is something that happens to you. 名词 Noun phrase 对…很有吸引力: 京剧对外国人很有吸引力 (Peking Opera has great appeal to foreigners).

examples.chinese: 这场精彩的功夫表演吸引了数千名观众。
examples.pinyin: Zhè chǎng jīng cǎi de gōng fu biǎo yǎn xī yǐn le shù qiān míng guān zhòng.
examples.english: This brilliant kung fu performance attracted thousands of audience members.

examples.chinese: 我被那位著名演员的演技深深地吸引住了。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ bèi nà wèi zhù míng yǎn yuán de yǎn jì shēn shēn de xī yǐn zhù le.
examples.english: I was deeply captivated by that famous actor's acting skills.

这部艺术杂志很有对年轻人吸引力。
对这部艺术杂志年轻人吸引力很有。
option_pinyin: Zhè bù yì shù zá zhì duì nián qīng rén hěn yǒu xī yǐn lì.
Zhè bù yì shù zá zhì nián qīng rén duì hěn yǒu xī yǐn lì.
Zhè bù yì shù zá zhì hěn yǒu duì nián qīng rén xī yǐn lì.
Duì zhè bù yì shù zá zhì nián qīng rén xī yǐn lì hěn yǒu.

exercises.question: Which sentence uses 被...吸引 correctly?
exercises.correct: 他被这场表演吸引住了，忘记了时间。
options: 他被这场表演吸引住了，忘记了时间。
他吸引被这场表演住了，忘记了时间。
他对这场表演很吸引，忘记了时间。
他让这场表演吸引力，忘记了时间。
option_pinyin: Tā bèi zhè chǎng biǎo yǎn xī yǐn zhù le, wàng jì le shí jiān.

exercises.question: 这场京剧演出的精彩___了很多从未看过京剧的外国人。

mini_exercises.question: 吸引 is commonly used as...
mini_exercises.correct: A transitive verb: 吸引 + object (to attract someone or something)
options: A transitive verb: 吸引 + object (to attract someone or something)
An adjective: placed after 很 or 非常
An intransitive verb: used without any object
A noun: placed after 的 as a modifier

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: This Peking Opera attracted many viewers.
mini_exercises.question_english: This Peking Opera attracted many viewers.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 吸引?
mini_exercises.correct: 精彩的表演吸引了大家的注意力。
options: 精彩的表演吸引了大家的注意力。
精彩的表演大家吸引了，注意力。
吸引精彩的表演，大家注意力了。
大家的注意力，精彩吸引了表演。
option_pinyin: jīng cǎi de biǎo yǎn xī yǐn le dà jiā de zhù yì lì
jīng cǎi de biǎo yǎn dà jiā xī yǐn le zhù yì lì
xī yǐn jīng cǎi de biǎo yǎn dà jiā zhù yì lì le
dà jiā de zhù yì lì jīng cǎi xī yǐn le biǎo yǎn

culture_notes.title: Peking Opera — China's National Treasure
culture_notes.content: Peking Opera (京剧, jīng jù) is one of China's most celebrated art forms, with a history of over 200 years. It emerged in Beijing during the Qing Dynasty and synthesises music, vocal performance, mime, acrobatics, and elaborate costume in a single theatrical tradition. There are four main role types: 生 (shēng) — male roles, typically the hero or scholar; 旦 (dàn) — female roles, played historically by male actors; 净 (jìng) — painted-face roles, usually bold warriors or powerful officials; and 丑 (chǒu) — the clown or comic character. The vivid face paint (脸谱, liǎnpǔ) is one of the most iconic elements: red signifies loyalty and bravery, white suggests cunning or treachery, black represents uprightness and integrity, and gold and silver denote supernatural beings. Beyond its visual spectacle, Peking Opera demands extraordinary physical discipline — performers train for years to master the stylised movements, acrobatic feats, and demanding vocal techniques that define the art form. In 2010, UNESCO inscribed Peking Opera on its Representative List of the Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity, recognising its outstanding cultural value for all of humankind.

idioms.english: Supremely skilled; so brilliant it seems magical (lit. emerging from spirit, entering transformation)
To reach the peak of perfection; the pinnacle of achievement (lit. climb the peak and reach the summit)

quiz.question: What does 京剧 mean?
Which word means 'brilliant; spectacular'?
What does 著名 mean?
Which word means 'to attract'?
What does 小说 mean?
Which word means 'magazine'?
What does the phrase 精彩演出 mean?
What does the phrase 吸引观众 mean?
Fill in: 他喜欢艺术，___是京剧。
Which sentence uses 著名 correctly in a formal context?
quiz.correct: 她是著名演员，演出过很多精彩的京剧。
options: 她是著名演员，演出过很多精彩的京剧。
她是很著名演员，演出过很多精彩的京剧。
她著名是演员，演出过很多精彩的京剧。
她是演员著名，演出过很多精彩的京剧。

quiz.question: Fill in: 我___那位著名演员的功夫表演完全吸引住了。
What does 尤其 mean?
Choose the correct use of 尤其.
quiz.correct: 这本艺术杂志吸引了很多人，尤其是喜欢阅读小说的读者。
options: 这本艺术杂志吸引了很多人，尤其是喜欢阅读小说的读者。
尤其这本艺术杂志吸引了喜欢阅读小说的读者很多人。
这本艺术杂志尤其吸引了，很多人是喜欢阅读小说的读者。
这本艺术杂志吸引了尤其很多人喜欢阅读小说的读者。

quiz.question: What are the four main role types in Peking Opera?
In Peking Opera face paint, what does the colour red represent?
Translate: 这场精彩的功夫表演吸引了很多观众。
quiz.correct: This brilliant kung fu performance attracted many audience members.
options: This brilliant kung fu performance attracted many audience members.
This famous kung fu actor performed brilliantly for many people.
Many audience members performed brilliantly in this kung fu show.
The kung fu performance was famous and attracted the audience.

quiz.question: Translate: 我被著名演员的京剧演出深深吸引了。
quiz.correct: I was deeply attracted by the famous actor's Peking Opera performance.
options: I was deeply attracted by the famous actor's Peking Opera performance.
The famous actor was deeply attracted by my Peking Opera performance.
I deeply attracted the famous actor with my Peking Opera performance.
The Peking Opera deeply attracted the famous actor's performance.

quiz.question: Translate: 他喜欢阅读各种小说，尤其是著名作家写的历史小说。
quiz.correct: He enjoys reading all kinds of novels, especially historical novels written by famous authors.
options: He enjoys reading all kinds of novels, especially historical novels written by famous authors.
He enjoys reading historical novels, especially those written by all kinds of famous authors.
He especially enjoys writing novels, in particular historical ones by famous authors.
Famous authors especially write all kinds of historical novels for him to read.

quiz.question: What does '欣赏京剧' mean?
Fill in: 欣赏京剧是了解中国文化 _____ 的好方法。
What does the phrase '中国艺术' mean?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 波伏娃，你昨晚去看京剧了吗？那场演出怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Bō Fú Wá, nǐ zuó wǎn qù kàn jīng jù le ma? Nà chǎng yǎn chū zěn me yàng?
lines.english: Camus, did you go to see the Peking Opera last night? How was that performance?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 太精彩了！我完全被那位著名演员的表演吸引住了。
lines.pinyin: Tài jīng cǎi le! Wǒ wán quán bèi nà wèi zhù míng yǎn yuán de biǎo yǎn xī yǐn zhù le.
lines.english: It was absolutely brilliant! I was completely captivated by that famous actor's performance.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 听说那位演员的功夫也很厉害，是吗？
lines.pinyin: Tīng shuō nà wèi yǎn yuán de gōng fu yě hěn lì hai, shì ma?
lines.english: I heard that actor's kung fu is also very impressive — is that true?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没错！他的功夫表演真的出神入化，全场观众都鼓掌了。
lines.pinyin: Méi cuò! Tā de gōng fu biǎo yǎn zhēn de chū shén rù huà, quán chǎng guān zhòng dōu gǔ zhǎng le.
lines.english: Exactly! His kung fu performance was truly supremely skilled — the entire audience applauded.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我对京剧艺术很感兴趣，尤其是那些色彩鲜艳的脸谱。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ duì jīng jù yì shù hěn gǎn xìng qù, yóu qí shì nà xiē sè cǎi xiān yàn de liǎn pǔ.
lines.english: I am very interested in the art of Peking Opera, especially the vivid and colourful face paint.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对，每种颜色都有特别的意思。我最近还在阅读一本关于京剧历史的小说，非常有趣。
lines.pinyin: Duì, měi zhǒng yán sè dōu yǒu tè bié de yì si. Wǒ zuì jìn hái zài yuè dú yì běn guān yú jīng jù lì shǐ de xiǎo shuō, fēi cháng yǒu qù.
lines.english: Yes, each colour has a special meaning. I have also been reading a novel about the history of Peking Opera recently — it is very interesting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Ó, shì nǎ běn shū? Wǒ yě xiǎng kàn!
lines.english: Oh, which book is it? I want to read it too!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 下次我把那本书带来给你，你一定也会被它吸引的。
lines.pinyin: Xià cì wǒ bǎ nà běn shū dài lái gěi nǐ, nǐ yí dìng yě huì bèi tā xī yǐn de.
lines.english: Next time I will bring the book for you — you will definitely be captivated by it too.

dialogues.title: A Student Asks About Chinese Arts and Culture
dialogues.title_chinese: 学生询问中国艺术与文化

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 王教授，我想了解更多关于中国艺术的知识，您能给我一点建议吗？
lines.pinyin: Wáng jiào shòu, wǒ xiǎng liǎo jiě gèng duō guān yú zhōng guó yì shù de zhī shi, nín néng gěi wǒ yì diǎn jiàn yì ma?
lines.english: Professor Wang, I would like to learn more about Chinese art. Could you give me some advice?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 当然！中国有很多著名的艺术形式，尤其是京剧和功夫，都非常值得了解。
lines.pinyin: Dāng rán! Zhōng guó yǒu hěn duō zhù míng de yì shù xíng shì, yóu qí shì jīng jù hé gōng fu, dōu fēi cháng zhí de liǎo jiě.
lines.english: Of course! China has many famous art forms, especially Peking Opera and kung fu — both are very much worth understanding.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我以前看过一次功夫表演，真的非常精彩，把我完全吸引住了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yǐ qián kàn guò yí cì gōng fu biǎo yǎn, zhēn de fēi cháng jīng cǎi, bǎ wǒ wán quán xī yǐn zhù le.
lines.english: I once saw a kung fu performance — it was truly brilliant and completely captivated me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那是当然的。除了现场演出，我建议你也多阅读一些相关的书籍和杂志。
lines.pinyin: Nà shì dāng rán de. Chú le xiàn chǎng yǎn chū, wǒ jiàn yì nǐ yě duō yuè dú yì xiē xiāng guān de shū jí hé zá zhì.
lines.english: Of course. Apart from live performances, I suggest you also read more related books and magazines.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 有没有您推荐的小说是写中国文化的？
lines.pinyin: Yǒu méi yǒu nín tuī jiàn de xiǎo shuō shì xiě zhōng guó wén huà de?
lines.english: Are there any novels you recommend that are about Chinese culture?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 有不少！这些小说能让读者深入了解中国人的生活和价值观，尤其是艺术与家庭的关系。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu bù shǎo! Zhè xiē xiǎo shuō néng ràng dú zhě shēn rù liǎo jiě zhōng guó rén de shēng huó hé jià zhí guān, yóu qí shì yì shù yǔ jiā tíng de guān xì.
lines.english: There are quite a few! These novels can let readers to deeply understand Chinese people's lives and values, especially the relationship between art and family.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 太好了！我会认真阅读的。中国文化真的很有魅力。
lines.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Wǒ huì rèn zhēn yuè dú de. Zhōng guó wén huà zhēn de hěn yǒu mèi lì.
lines.english: Wonderful! I will read them seriously. Chinese culture is truly attractive.
